prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约15342→17016→15100→23550→25101，2024年因新高考改革专业组拆分，再选不限组位次大幅后移至23550名，2025年继续 后移至25101名，近两年累计后移约10000名，呈明显后移趋势；2025年基准约25101名；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为112人，2024–2025年增至129人；2026 年计划132人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.3%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第84名，近年排名稳定在 75–84区间，属于中上水平211；该校未出现在近年声誉评价及投档异常文件中，说明无明显负面舆情或断档事件；抖音热度排名中未见该校，短视频曝光度一般 ，报考关注度平稳；电气工程A（全国顶尖）、动力工程及工程热物理A-，电力行业特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气类 、计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度偏热/高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数451000人，按近年比例估算物理类约313000人，较2025年物理类320779人略减约2.4%，竞争略 有缓解；该校位于河北保定，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；安徽省属华东地区，考生对京 津冀地区高校接受度较高，地域偏好中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招2.3%及本省物理类考生略减约2.4%，供需两端变化基本对冲，但考生规模小幅下降形成缓冲；结合学校声誉平稳、电气王牌专业热度偏高等因素，预计2026年最低位次约25401名，较2025年25101 名小幅后移约300名，区间24901–25901名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 15342 → 17016 → 15100 → 23550 → 25101. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and the splitting of major groups, the ranking for the unrestricted group significantly dropped to 23550, and continued to drop to 25101 in 2025, with a cumulative drop of about 10000 in the past two years, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 25101. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 112 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 129 in 2024–2025, and is planned to be 132 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2.3% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. This university has not appeared in recent reputation evaluations or abnormal admission files, indicating no significant negative public opinion or discontinuation events. It is not listed in Douyin popularity rankings, with average short video exposure and stable application attention. Electrical Engineering is rated A (top in the country), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, with distinctive characteristics in the electric power industry, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical, Computer, and Electronic Information are socially popular/highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is 451,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 313,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 2.4% compared to 320,779 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei, not a local university, so there is no local admission preference. Anhui Province is in the East China region, and examinees have a high acceptance of universities in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei area, with neutral regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, a slight expansion of 2.3% in the 2026 plan, and a slight decrease of about 2.4% in the number of Physics Category examinees in the province, the changes in supply and demand basically offset each other, but the small decrease in examinee numbers provides a buffer. Combined with the stable reputation of the university and the high popularity of the flagship Electrical Engineering major, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be approximately 25401, a slight drop of about 300 from 25101 in 2025, with a range of 24901–25901.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 25401, range 24901–25901. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information), and use Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<24901), you can focus on sprinting for A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>25901), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors such as Accounting and Economics, while also considering Tier 2 majors like Mechanical Engineering and Energy and Power Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 5304 → 4976 → 4664 → 4396 → 5530. From 2021 to 2024, there was a year-on-year upward trend (improving from 5304 to 4396), but in 2025, it significantly dropped to 5530, moving back about 1134 places compared to 2024, showing large fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 5530. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 15 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 11 students in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 8 students, a reduction of about 27.3% compared to 2025, a significant contraction, leading to noticeably reduced competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 84th, with stable rankings in recent years. The university has not appeared in recent reputation evaluations or abnormal admission files, with no significant negative public opinion. It is not listed in Douyin popularity rankings, indicating average exposure. Its strengths are Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), but the History Category majors (Law, Administrative Management, Foreign Languages and Literature, Social Work) have low relevance to the university's advantageous engineering fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but fierce competition; Foreign Languages and Literature has average popularity and is worth observing. In 2026, the province's total number of examinees is 451,000, with an estimated 138,000 in the History Category based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 2.4% compared to 141,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei, not a local university. The History Category majors are more humanities-oriented, with low alignment to the university's engineering characteristics, and regional preference is neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of a significant ranking drop in 2025, the notable enrollment reduction of 27.3% in 2026, and a slight decrease of about 2.4% in provincial History Category examinees, the competition relief from the enrollment reduction is significant, but there is some correction pressure after the abnormal ranking drop in 2025. Combined with stable university reputation and average popularity of humanities majors, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4655, moving forward about 875 places from 5530 in 2025, with a range of 4155–5155.
